chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Crl. Bail Application No.1557 of 2025 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ For order as to maintainability 07.07.2025 Mr. Sajeel Rehman, Advocate for the Applicant Mr. Khadim Hussain, Addl. P.G. -------------------------------------- After hearing at length, learned counsel for the applicant states that he does not press the instant bail application provided that protective bail may be granted to the applicant enabling him to surrender before the trial Court. Accordingly, without touching the merits of the case, applicant Sabir Shah S/o Jaffar Shah is granted protective bail for a period of 07 days from today subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees fifty thousand only) with P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. It is made clear that if the applicant fails to surrender before the trial Court within the prescribed time, the surety submitted by him shall be forfeited. The instant bail application is disposed of. JUDGE Kamran/PS
